content:
Ensure the app is running the latest updated code (no rebuild of logic, only fix preview/runtime sync)

IMPORTANT:
- Do NOT rewrite features
- Do NOT redo any implementation
- Do NOT change business logic
- Only fix why the current running app does NOT reflect latest changes

==================================================
PART 1 – VERIFY CODE IS ACTUALLY UPDATED
==================================================

1. Confirm that the following features exist in the CURRENT codebase:
   - requestMode (fixed_days / open_ended)
   - numberOfDays input
   - LanguageSelector in header
   - avatar upload logic

2. If they exist, DO NOT rewrite them

==================================================
PART 2 – FIX PREVIEW / EXPO SYNC ISSUE
==================================================

Problem:
The running app does NOT reflect the latest code changes.

Fix:

1. Restart the development server properly
2. Clear all caches
3. Ensure the preview is pointing to the latest build
4. Force refresh the preview environment

Steps:
- Stop current dev process
- Run with clean cache
- Reinitialize preview session

==================================================
PART 3 – ENSURE QR USES LATEST BUILD
==================================================

1. Regenerate QR code
2. Ensure it is linked to the latest dev session
3. Confirm no old Metro bundler instance is running

==================================================
PART 4 – VERIFY VISUALLY
==================================================

Confirm the following are NOW visible in the running app:

1. Equipment request screen:
   - Shows option:
     - fixed number of days
     - open-ended

2. Header:
   - Language icon visible for guest
   - Notification hidden for guest

3. Profile:
   - Avatar picker is clickable

If not visible, DO NOT rewrite logic — fix the runtime issue only.

==================================================
RETURN
==================================================

Return:
1. Why the app was showing old UI
2. What was done to fix preview/runtime
3. Confirmation that preview now reflects latest code
